text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day off, I accompany Yaeno Muteki to visit
her hometown at her invitation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I want to run unrestrained, with all my fiery
emotions unleashed, there is something I have to
do first.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've avoided it for so long, but I must come
face-to-face with myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Why am I filled with such violent fury that sends
me into uncontrollable rages?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To find the answer, I must reflect upon and
uncover my very essence.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To accomplish this, I've decided to revisit my
Kongo Yaegaki training in order to face my past.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, we've arrived. Come, it's time to take a
stroll down memory lane.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get off the train and go deeper into the
mountains. She tells me we're heading to the
place where students of the dojo meditate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we traverse the mountain path, Yaeno Muteki
begins opening up to me about her troubles.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've shied away from confronting
myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was loath to do so, for the act would require me
to scrutinize my own ugly flaws.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Where did the shameful desire to force everyone
to do my bidding come from?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And what if I manage to trace that shamefulness
back to its source, only to find I've got nothing
inside but ugliness.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Those kinds of thoughts have made me fearful of
facing myself.
choice_data_list: You know you don't have to do this, right?
You know you don't have to do this, right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No. I do.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must! Even if I'm scared, I want to press on. I'm
choosing to walk down this path, so I may gain
the skills I need to become stronger.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must, for the sake of creating a racing
generation spearheaded by me and my dear
rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki imbues her every word with intense
determination, as if using them to cast away her
doubts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is where those who practice the Kongo
Yaegaki style come to meditate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki dons her signature racewear to
compose herself in both mind and body for the
equilibrium required in meditation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall now face myself and ascertain who I truly
am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that meditating side-by-side might help
us become attuned to one another, just like when
we performed katas together.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm! That would be very much appreciated. Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's begin...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Why is it that I wish to avoid being ruled by my
emotions? Why do I feel such reluctance to
behave as I used to?)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(The answer is simple. Nobody desires to be
around that foolish version of me.)

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
Shut up, shut up, shut up! You're just a weakling!
Don't you talk back to me!

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
If you think you're so good, then show me what
you got! Whoever wins is the boss!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Girl A
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You're unbelievable! Go away already!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Girl B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ...I hate you, Yaeno! You're too scary!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Some kids buckled under my aggressive
behavior, but everyone was afraid of me... and
detested me.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(And of course they did. Who in their right mind
would embrace a conceited tyrant who uses force
to twist logic to their own liking?)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I knew my actions weren't just. Yet, despite
knowing it was wrong, I couldn't help but be the
way I was.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I hadn't bent them to my will with force, no one
would have accepted me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was always irritated and quick to anger. It was
only natural people hated me... But I didn't want
to be despised.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So I used my strength to overpower them. I made
them accept me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be accepted... I didn't want to be
hated...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was just a foolish nobody prone to
violent tendencies, I wished for others to really
see me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There it is at the heart of my violent behavior.
The essence of my raging emotions is none other
than...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A wretched, intense desire for
acknowledgement—for praise.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Containing my fiery emotions means suppressing
that desire. If I don't wish to be praised, then I
won't act so violently.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Once I began to repress my emotions and
refrained from resorting to violence, everybody
stopped hating me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even someone like me was able to gain
acceptance. Once I ceased being a puppet of my
emotions, people let me in.
But is that true?

Am I really no longer at the whim of my
emotions? Can I really say I'm in control of my
desire for approval?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Am I...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Am I being controlled by my hunger for praise
even now?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I seethe over how beloved Oguri is and her status
as the star of our generation! I rage for
acknowledgement! I scream for people to look at
me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: In reality, my desire to overturn the public's opinion is just me wanting to make everyone accept that I'm the star!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Nothing about me has changed! I haven't grown
at all!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even now, I am simply a marionette dangling from
the strings of my selfish need for approval!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm... a failure.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I act on my instincts and run with my emotions
laid bare...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will only become that petty tyrant I used to be...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll fly into petty rages and use my strength to
strong-arm others... I'll flaunt my power, howl for
praise, and demand that no one hate me...
choice_data_list: And what's so bad about that?
And what's so bad about that?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I echo her words and tell her she should let her temper fly and overwhelm others with her strength and flaunt her power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue, asking if the strength she wishes to
rely on is the same coercive strength as before.
choice_data_list:
Or is it the strength of your legs, which churn up
the very earth with your every step?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The core of Yaeno Muteki's being has never
changed. She's always had that overwhelming
desire for acknowledgement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the past, she merely wished to be praised. And
if violence could prove she was superior to
others, then so be it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's no longer true. She's thrown herself into
the world of racing and learned how to divert her
strength to the track through the Kongo Yaegaki
style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then she met rivals who strove to outdo one
another and push each other to be
better—invaluable friends who brave this era of
competition together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then came a number of adversaries—fellow racers
who each had their own strengths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And of course, there's the racer who kindles her
competitive fire—the one she wishes to surpass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Competing against them has directed Yaeno
Muteki's desire for approval to the domain of
racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If so, then what's wrong with her setting her heart
ablaze, using strength to claim first and make
others yield to her?
choice_data_list: Isn't that what racing is all about?
Isn't that what racing is all about?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: People... really won't hate me?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even if I run with all my emotions out for the
world to see?
choice_data_list:
Do you really think they'll hate you after seeing
how determined you are?

Do you really think they'll hate you after seeing
how determined you are?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You always seem so relaxed during races, Yaeno.
Are you really giving it all you've got?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You were holding back, weren't you? I bet you
coulda gone harder!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I feel like I've gotten a little closer to
knowing the real you. I like it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You never stopped racing. It's as if you've been
running in defiance of Oguri and the others—as if
to challenge the world.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The sight of you running true to your style, even
amidst all the cheering for Oguri... It gave me
courage.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Everyone I've competed against...
choice_data_list:
They all accept you for who you are. You'll be
okay.

They all accept you for who you are. You'll be
okay.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
They all recognize their opponents' strength... I've
fought alongside them while we've pushed each
other toward greater heights...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they've long been aware that my hunger
for victory is driven by my desire for praise.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And that I race wildly according to my emotions...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to follow my heart and take on the autumn
Tenno Sho without suppressing my emotions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Although I can't set my fears completely to rest...
I believe in everyone.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I believe they will accept the path that I have
chosen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An intense blaze shines in Yaeno Muteki's eyes,
one that burns with the tumultuous passions deep
inside her.
